ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the healthcare provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare provider */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entitlements" (
  "entitlement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entitlement */,
  "entitlement_name" TEXT /* Name of the entitlement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entitlement */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the entitlement */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Details about what the entitlement covers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entitlement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flagged_treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flagged treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the treatment belongs to */,
  "entitlement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entitlement associated with the treatment */,
  "flagged_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was flagged */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider assigned to the treatment */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the treatment */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the flagged treatment */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Resolution status of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flagged_treatments_entitlement_id FOREIGN KEY ("entitlement_id") REFERENCES entitlements ("entitlement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flagged_treatments_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flagged_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment the action belongs to */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, update) */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_actions_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES flagged_treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_entitlements" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the entitlement belongs to */,
  "entitlement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entitlement */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the entitlement becomes effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the entitlement expires */,
  "issuing_authority" TEXT /* Authority that issued the entitlement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "entitlement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being assigned */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_assignments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_assignments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, update) */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient affected by the action */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider affected by the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, provider, staff) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
